description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a medium build, dressed in a button-up collared shirt and fitted pants. He is wearing casual shoes and a wristwatch on his left wrist. His hair is short and slightly tousled, and his facial features are clearly defined. The shirt is untucked, giving a relaxed yet presentable appearance suitable for urban environments. The figure's posture is upright, with arms relaxed at his sides and head slightly tilted upward. The overall look suggests a casual, everyday city dweller, possibly commuting or walking through a public space.
description: An adult male pedestrian in a button-up shirt, fitted pants, and casual shoes, standing upright with a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, button-up shirt, wristwatch, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, shirt collar, and shoe details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, pants, and hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, shirt seam, and shoe outline.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt and fitted pants
